calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an adult and for a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson II, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Petitioner Zeenath Abidi Freeman was present in pro per for self and as guardian ad litem for the minro Taymour Park Freeman. Minor's father Nathaniel Freeman is also present in court, parties were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Zeena Abidi Freeman and change of name of the minor to Tay Park Freeman.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
